title: Teacher Profile
description: Stable identity and preference layer for the teacher. Overridden at course or class level where needed.

teacher_id.description: Short identifier used in generated filenames and logs.

name.description: Display name for headers, pacing guides, sub plans.

default_lesson_length_minutes.description: Default block length. Overridden per class profile.

default_teaching_mode.description: Global default. Set at class level for classes that differ.

voice_notes.description: Free-text style reminder for generation — what this teacher does and does not want in generated content.
